subject: flgiht times
body:
TEB - Zorro (Santa Fe) 3+45min wind  -33kts
TEB - Paris 6+36min (+49kts  wind).
LSJ weather- haze with visibility 5  miles. Windy 25 mph  tomorrow,
 large weather system south of LSJ moving  west at this time may pass to the 
south of St. Thomas with current movement  and minimal impact to LSJ. 
need to confirm with radar in the morning for accurate  weather forecast.
